summary.zh: 本网站首版内容以2026年6月26日为资料校验日，后续案例和法规动态将通过结构化数据持续更新。
summary.en: The initial version of this site uses 26 June 2026 as the source-check date; later cases and legal developments will be maintained through structured data.

summary.zh: 欧盟CBAM从过渡申报进入正式制度，出口商需要支持进口商完成授权、排放数据和证书成本安排。
summary.en: EU CBAM moves from transitional reporting into its definitive regime, requiring exporters to support importers on authorization, emissions data, and certificate-cost allocation.

title.zh: 美国对外投资安全规则生效
title.en: U.S. outbound investment security rules take effect

summary.zh: 美国对特定中国半导体、量子和AI投资设定禁止或申报规则，影响融资、基金和技术合作。
summary.en: The United States applies prohibition or notification rules to certain China-related semiconductor, quantum, and AI investments, affecting financing, funds, and technical cooperation.

source.label: U.S. Treasury Outbound Investment Security Program

title.zh: 欧盟强迫劳动产品禁令开始倒计时
title.en: EU forced-labour product ban countdown begins

summary.zh: 条例已生效并将在2027年适用，企业应在适用前完成供应链追溯、劳工审计和证据包设计。
summary.en: The regulation has entered into force and will apply in 2027, giving companies a window to build traceability, labour audits, and evidence packs.

title.zh: CSDDD进入转化和分阶段适用窗口
title.en: CSDDD moves into transposition and phased application

summary.zh: 欧盟企业可持续尽调指令进入成员国转化和分阶段适用过程，供应商将感受到合同传导压力。
summary.en: The EU CSDDD enters transposition and phased application, with suppliers likely to experience contractual pass-through pressure.

title.zh: 欧盟对中国电动汽车征收反补贴税
title.en: EU imposes countervailing duties on Chinese EVs

summary.zh: 五年期反补贴税强化了新能源企业对补贴台账、成本模型和公共叙事的管理需求。
summary.en: Five-year countervailing duties increase the need for subsidy registers, cost models, and public narratives among new-energy firms.

title.zh: Temu收到DSA非法产品风险初步认定
title.en: Temu receives DSA preliminary findings on illegal-product risk

summary.zh: 平台商品治理、商家可追溯和风险评估成为跨境电商在欧合规核心。
summary.en: Product governance, trader traceability, and risk assessment become central EU compliance issues for cross-border e-commerce.

source.label: European Commission Temu DSA preliminary findings

title.en: EU opens DSA proceedings against AliExpress

summary.zh: 非法商品、广告透明、投诉机制和研究者访问进入平台合规检查清单。
summary.en: Illegal goods, ad transparency, complaint mechanisms, and researcher access enter the platform-compliance checklist.

title.zh: TikTok因数据跨境问题被爱尔兰DPC罚款
title.en: TikTok fined by Irish DPC over cross-border data transfers

summary.zh: EEA用户数据向中国访问或转移的保障措施和透明度成为监管焦点。
summary.en: Safeguards and transparency for EEA user data access or transfer to China become the regulatory focus.

source.label: Irish Data Protection Commission press releases

title.zh: 意大利监管机构对DeepSeek采取数据保护行动
title.en: Italian regulator acts on DeepSeek data protection

summary.zh: 生成式AI服务的数据收集、告知、存储地点和跨境访问成为进入欧洲前必须解释的问题。
summary.en: Data collection, notices, storage location, and cross-border access for generative AI services must be explained before entering Europe.

title.zh: 中国促进和规范数据跨境流动规定落地
title.en: China's cross-border data-flow facilitation rules take effect

summary.zh: 低风险场景有所放宽，但企业仍需建立数据地图和传输机制判断。
summary.en: Some low-risk scenarios are eased, but companies still need data maps and transfer-mechanism assessments.

title.zh: 《网络数据安全管理条例》生效
title.en: Network Data Security Management Regulation takes effect

summary.zh: 网络数据处理者在分类分级、重要数据、个人信息和安全事件方面承担更具体义务。
summary.en: Network data processors face more concrete obligations on classification, important data, personal information, and security incidents.

title.zh: 美国更新对华先进半导体出口管制
title.en: U.S. updates advanced semiconductor export controls on China

summary.zh: 设备、软件、实体清单和FDPR共同影响半导体供应链交易。
summary.en: Equipment, software, Entity List, and FDPR rules jointly affect semiconductor supply-chain transactions.

title.zh: 美国中国/香港低值包裹规则改变
title.en: U.S. changes low-value shipment rules for China/Hong Kong

summary.zh: 小包直邮模式面临税费、申报、原产地和产品合规重新测算。
summary.en: Direct-mail parcel models face recalculation of duties, declaration, origin, and product compliance.

title.en: DOJ issues new FCPA enforcement guidance

summary.zh: 执法重点调整不等于反腐放松；第三方、政府采购和跨国犯罪关联仍是高风险触点。
summary.en: Enforcement reprioritization does not mean anti-corruption relaxation; third parties, public procurement, and transnational-crime links remain high-risk touchpoints.

title.zh: FCC Covered List继续影响通信和安防设备准入
title.en: FCC Covered List continues to affect telecoms and surveillance equipment access

summary.zh: 认证、政府采购、客户合约和售后服务均可能因国家安全名单而受影响。
summary.en: Certification, public procurement, customer contracts, and after-sales service may all be affected by national-security lists.

title.zh: CBP UFLPA统计看板持续更新
title.en: CBP UFLPA statistics dashboard continues updating

summary.zh: 企业可按行业、原产地和状态追踪扣留、放行和拒绝情况，用作供应链风险预警。
summary.en: Companies can track detentions, releases, and denials by sector, origin, and status as a supply-chain risk warning tool.
